name: xdm_aria2_integration_overlay
description: Adds an optional authenticated aria2 JSON-RPC backend with managed-process and external-RPC modes, settings persistence, task controls, UI integration, qualification tests, stale parity-entry cleanup, and deterministic PAC parsing.
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms, CoreFx or MSIX targets
Keep the built-in download engine as the default
Bind managed aria2 RPC to loopback only
Require HTTPS and an RPC secret for non-loopback external endpoints
Remove any stale download.aria2-backend entry from docs/parity/features.json because aria2 is not a legacy parity feature
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Keep PAC parsing bounded and deterministic under parallel test load
